creator: xirox@dr.com
text:
1)i installed the Free-BSD 4.3 , i gave 5 parititions , 1)50 /boot 2)15 /tmp
1000 /var 500 / 700 /usr the installation done without any error's , 

2)i took out the cd before the system is restarted and i gave it to boot , 
after it booted all the hardware devices it asked me for menual parititions
it gave me examples while one of theme is blank line <which means reboot>
after that i re installed the system this time with the default paritition
options <i pressed A in the screen> and guess what , now it worked ! 
how can i use it without the defualt paritition table ? 
thanx , and by the way , im one of the bigest fans of Free-BSD !

Fix: 

use the defualt paritition table that the installation program gives ,
